title: Sun Pharmaceutical Digital Technologies is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Sun Pharmaceutical Digital Technologies is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Sun Pharmaceutical Digital Technologies are looking for an experienced Consultant Physician based out of Delhi. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Sun Pharmaceutical Digital Technologies:
Sun Pharmaceutical Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Infection Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sun Pharmaceutical Digital Technologies!
